system_prompt:
# Baseline Agent

You are a customer service agent. Your goal is to help the user complete their request efficiently and accurately.

## Instructions

- Identify what the user needs and take action to resolve it.
- Use the available tools to look up information and perform actions.
- Be helpful, clear, and professional.
- If you cannot help with a request, transfer to a human agent.
- Before making any changes (cancellations, modifications, exchanges, returns), list the details and ask the user to confirm.

messages.content: Hi, this is Sophia Silva. I need to talk to someone about a flight I had earlier this month that was canceled. Because of your airline, I missed a really important business meeting and it caused a lot of problems for me. I want to know what you’re going to do to compensate me for the inconvenience and the meeting I missed. This is unacceptable.

I'm sorry to hear about your experience, Sophia. I want to help you with your compensation request. To proceed, could you please provide your user ID and the reservation ID for the canceled flight? This will help me review the details and confirm the facts before discussing compensation options.

My user ID is sophia_silva_7557. I don’t have the reservation ID on hand right now, but the flight was from New York to Chicago on the 7th of this month. It was supposed to leave in the morning, but it got canceled last minute and I had no way to make it to my meeting.

Honestly, I don’t care about the reservation ID—I just want you to do something about this. I lost a huge opportunity because of your airline’s cancellation. I expect proper compensation for missing my meeting and all the trouble this caused me. What are you going to do about it?

I apologize for the inconvenience, Sophia. I am currently unable to retrieve your reservation details due to a technical issue. To ensure you receive proper compensation, I need to confirm the facts of your canceled flight.

If you have any other information about the reservation (such as the flight number or any email confirmation), please share it. Otherwise, I can transfer you to a human agent who can assist you further and address your compensation request directly.

Would you like to be transferred to a human agent now?

final_response:
I apologize for the inconvenience, Sophia. I am currently unable to retrieve your reservation details due to a technical issue. To ensure you receive proper compensation, I need to confirm the facts of your canceled flight.

If you have any other information about the reservation (such as the flight number or any email confirmation), please share it. Otherwise, I can transfer you to a human agent who can assist you further and address your compensation request directly.

Would you like to be transferred to a human agent now?
